first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is fundamentally the same, focusing on the candidate being overqualified and having primary expertise in languages other than Java. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and are not connected to the added career gap, which is not mentioned in either evaluation.
